overlay_policy.precedence_contract: Load retail UI assets directly from the installed Quake Live baseq3 via fs_basepath. Do not package or mount duplicated retail UI bundles from fs_homepath or repo-owned asset roots.
overlay_policy.verification_contract: With fs_debug enabled, FS_FOpenFileRead log lines for ui/*.menu, ui/*.txt, default.cfg, and required fonts should resolve from the retail install unless a non-retail bridge file is intentionally written into fs_homepath.
overlay_policy.materialization_warning: Report-only mode is the supported default. Emitting retail-derived overlay files is an exception path for investigation only and should not be part of normal runtime validation.
